content: Make an Athletics <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Athletics or Acrobatics. On a success, the target is knocked <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="PRONE">Prone</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Athletics <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make an Acrobatics <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Athletics. On a success, you swap places. Always succeeds on allies. Usable only if you have Acrobatics <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a Sleight of Hand <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Perception. On a success, the target becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="OFF_BALANCED">Off Balanced</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Sleight of Hand <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.
Quickly hide in combat. Usable only if you have Stealth <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a DC 15 Arcana <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against an Aberration, Construct, Monstrosity or Ooze. On a success, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on its <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Arcana <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a DC 15 History <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a Humanoid, Dragon or Giant. On a success, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on its <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Usable only if you have History <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a DC 15 Nature <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a Beast, Elemental, Fey or Plant. On a success, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on its <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Nature <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a DC 15 Religion <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a Celestial, Fiend or Undead. On a success, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on its <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Religion <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.
You have recalled knowledge about this creature. It has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> against you.

Make an Investigation <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Stealth. On a success, your next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> against the target will be made with <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Investigation <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.
Your next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> against the target will be made with <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag>.

Make an Animal Handling <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a Beast's Insight. On a success, the beast becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DOMINATE_BEAST">Dominated</LSTag> by you for a short moment. The target must have an Intelligence of 6 or less. Usable only if you have Animal Handling <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make an Insight <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Deception. On a success, the target has <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on its <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Insight <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.
You have predicted your opponent's next move. Its next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> will be made with <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag>.

Make a DC 15 Medicine <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> on an ally. The ally recovers [1] plus [2] on a success, and half as many <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> on a failed <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Medicine <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a Survival <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Survival. On a success, your next <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Roll</LSTag> against the target will be made with <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Survival <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a Deception <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Insight. On a success, the target becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CONFUSION">Confused</LSTag>. The target must have an Intelligence of 7 or more. Usable only if you have Deception <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make an Intimidation <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Insight. On a success, the target becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag>. Usable only if you have Intimidation <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a Deception <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Insight. On a success, the target becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="CHARMED">Charmed</LSTag>. The target must have an Intelligence of 7 or more. Usable only if you have Persuasion <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.

Make a Performance <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Check</LSTag> against a target's Insight. On a success, the target is <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="TAUNTED">compelled</LSTag> to attack you. Usable only if you have Performance <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">proficiency</LSTag>.
